## Source: ghsa-malware (56c5bd4f954aae8930b39053e2a4716c8c2a6184d4128d62457c6de371e403a4)
## Source: ossf-package-analysis (715b9e91530380e15e848bc0374f342584cdd61853308582683eb214e0da9927)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'google-apis-androidpublisher_v2' @ 0.0 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:
- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'google-apis-androidpublisher_v2' @ 0.0 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:
- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
